expectedDifferences.reason: The proxy returns a deterministic unique shpat_ synthetic token on create while local-runtime evidence keeps the secret-shaped field redacted.

notes: HAR-584 executable local-runtime shape coverage for storefrontAccessTokenCreate. Live write evidence remains blocked by the current conformance credential's ACCESS_DENIED response for storefrontAccessTokenCreate, so this spec reuses the HAR-452 local-runtime fixture with live safe-read evidence and strictly checks non-empty storefront scopes plus shop.id while matching the create-only token with a shpat_ token matcher.
